title: Breakwave Bi Weekly Drybulk Report Dec 19 2023 Jhgyn19
section_path: Breakwave Bi Weekly Drybulk Report Dec 19 2023 Jhgyn19
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi Weekly Drybulk Report Dec 19 2023 Jhgyn19
summary:
Main
• White Christmas in China brings holiday joy for Capesize owners - Surprise Christmas gifts are the best and Capesize owners are getting a big one this year. A confluence of events in the past month begun with a surge in rates in the Atlantic on tight vessel availability and has now been followed by a very cold weather front in North China that is causing delays and tightening vessel availability in the Pacific region. The result is a spot Capesize market that so far has failed to correct the way that the freight futures market has been dictating and the strength is now threatening to expand during a period that activity tends to calm down as the Christmas holidays rapidly approach.
